title: Reviewing status, unified icons, and agentic review prompts
description: Adds `status-value:reviewing` with agentic styling, unifies change-detection icons via IconSymbols, wires sidebar filters and CTAs, and polishes the review summary with agentic copy prompts. Start with **IconSymbols**, then **CollectionGrid** and **Summary screen**.

collections.title: IconSymbols — new, reviewing, modified
collections.rationale: Refreshed new (+) and modified (dot) glyphs plus the reviewing sparkle icon shared across sidebar and review UI.

collections.title: Filter panel — reviewing status chip
collections.rationale: Reviewing gets its own filter group above change-detection statuses when present, and stays hidden otherwise.

collections.title: ReviewCuratedStoriesButton — idle and active
collections.rationale: New CTA for AI-curated reviews: idle label, active reviewing state with agentic styling, and toggle that applies the reviewing filter.

collections.title: ReviewChangesButton — precedence over curated review
collections.rationale: Change-detection CTA hides when reviewing stories exist so the two review flows do not compete.

collections.title: CollectionGrid — shared status icons and overflow
collections.rationale: Story tiles use shared IconSymbols for new/modified badges; stories now mount IconSymbols so glyphs render in isolation.

collections.title: Summary screen — empty, full, and stale states
collections.rationale: Empty state agentic copy-prompt button, full review layout with unified icons, and stale banner with refresh prompt popover.
